- bump PORTEPOCH
- ${MASTER_SITES_GOOGLE_CODE} -> GOOGLE_CODE
- define RUN_DEPENDS exactly (portlint warning)
- fix egginfo after switching to DISTVERSION
- whitespace fixes in pkg-descr
